compiled_state.title: Implement suggest-test-index.sh CI failure suggestion script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/suggest-test-index.sh for CI failure suggestion pipeline (SC3, SC4).

## Interface
suggest-test-index.sh --changed-files=<file> --failing-tests=<file> [--suggestions-path=<path>]

## Logic
1. For each failing test, fuzzy-match against changed source files
2. Dedup against .test-index and .test-index-suggestions before appending
3. Ambiguous cases (0 or 2+ matches) omitted
4. Create .test-index-suggestions if absent
5. Apply REBASE_HEAD filter for incoming-only files

## Output Format
source/path.ext: test/path.ext (same as .test-index)

## Also: chmod +x, remove .test-index RED marker

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/suggest-test-index.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep "suggest-test-index" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test \$? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
